runners.formComment: Placed last time (43.43) at The Meadows in a Restricted WIN, finishing second and beaten 2.5 lengths. Has a win and two places from three starts from this draw. Key chance and should go close.

runners.formComment: Improved sharply when third behind Flying Discrete at Sandown last start over 595m (35.07). Has to be respected.

runners.formComment: Latest effort finished 3rd on April 1 over 660m at Ballarat behind Midnight Phantom beaten 2.5 lengths (38.36) in a Restricted WIN. Although unsuccessful last time still ran one of the quickest times on the card. Stick with her.

runners.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 2.5 lengths over 730m at The Meadows in a handy (43.25), beating Midnight Phantom. Will find this a bit tougher, in winning form but this a tough assignment.

runners.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 630m at Nowra. Hard to entertain this time.

runners.formComment: Is back up to 650m which has been an issue in the past. Last appeared when fourth over 450m at this track nine days ago. Can't recommend against this lot.

runners.formComment: Solid performance after racing just off the speed to win by half a length at The Meadows over 600m (34.74) beating Champlain in Grade 5 on April 4. Doesn't look smart enough to threaten the top few.
